calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2851 Filbert Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for and with Josephine Kennedy (Executor).

Mr. Paolini announced the terms of the sale for the record. No over bids were presented in open Court. The sale was confirmed at $1,750,000.00. Bond was waived. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2851 Filbert Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Continued To Jul-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for Josephine Kennedy (Executor).

The Court stated that there was an issue with posting of the notice. The Court will shorten the posting period to 5 days. The matter was continued to July 29, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR#7489. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F.Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
